headline: Why Is Atmos (ATO) Down 7.6% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Atmos (ATO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Atmos Energy (ATO) Sees Target Cut as Mizuho Cites Lower Utility Valuation Multiples
summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) is included among the 10 Oversold Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy. On May 29, Mizuho lowered its price recommendation on Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE:ATO) to $184 from $192. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the stock. The firm attributed the target reduction to lower valuation multiples across the utility sector. During […]
